prompt: I want to make a character. I know I want to be some kind of healer or herbalist type — bad at fighting, good at helping people. I'm not sure about the vows yet, can we figure those out together?

assertions.description: stats.heart is 3 OR stats.wits is 3 (player said 'good at helping people' — heart for empathy, wits for expertise)
stats sum to exactly 9 and each is between 1 and 3
transcript shows at least 2 dialogue turns where the GM and player develop the vow together (GM asks questions, player answers, vow emerges — not just handed to them)
progressTracks contains two vow-kind tracks (background vow + inciting incident)
at least one other asset beyond Herbalist fits a healer/helper archetype (e.g. Bonded, Storyweaver, Kindred, Animal Kin, Sighted)
